title: Found Anywhere
subtitle: Wherever you are, that's a place
intro: A car, a boat, a hospital window, a grandparent's apartment. Anywhere has organisms in it -- find three you don't already have.
outro: There is no boring place. You proved it.

steps.hint: Look at where you actually are -- not where you wish you were.

steps.description: Find a second new living thing
steps.hint: Different organism. Plant, then bug. Or bug, then bird.

steps.description: Find a third new living thing
steps.hint: If you're stuck, look smaller. Lichens, moss, a fly on a windowsill all count.
